Amended Notice Of Defendants Special Motion To Strike
Off Calendar Jul-09-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kyle Montes De Oca, esq. (415-352-0980) of Roeca Haas Montes De Oca, LLP for Defendant.
No other appearances.

Discussed, Mr. De Oca read an email he received from Plaintiff's counsel stating she will not be appearing to contest after all. The Court noted Ms. McCarthy's (Plaintiff's Counsel) email to the court was sent shortly after midnight and did not realize she was expecting a response permitting her to contest. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs REBECCA MENDRIBIL, ALISA MENDRIBIL, and JOHN MENDRIBIL's Special Motion To Strike:

Defendants Rebecca Mendribil, Alisa Mendribil, and John Mendribil's special motion to strike complaint pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure 425.16 is granted. (see word minutes for full details).

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

Defendant Rebecca Mendribil, Alisa Mendribil, John Mendribil Amended Notice Of Defendants Special Motion To Strike (Part 2 Of 2 Tentative Ruling Purposes Only)
